prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to england and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document pertains to the Civil Justice Statistics Quarterly which specifically outlines civil and administrative justice systems, primarily detailing the operations and statistics of the County Courts in England and Wales. As it includes processes unique to the legal systems of England and Wales, it applies directly to England.
